transform.expr: datum.mealtime_col == 'Q8.1.Norms_for_Breakfast' ? 'Breakfast' : datum.mealtime_col == 'Q8.2.Norms_for_Brunch' ? 'Brunch' : datum.mealtime_col == 'Q8.3.Norms_for_Lunch' ? 'Lunch' : datum.mealtime_col == 'Q8.4.Norms_for_Dinner' ? 'Dinner' : datum.mealtime_col == 'Q8.5.Norms_for_Supper' ? 'Supper' : datum.mealtime_col == 'Q8.6.Norms_for_Snack' ? 'Snack' : 'Tea Time'

indexof(datum.meal_text, 'Rice') >= 0 || indexof(datum.meal_text, 'Noodles') >= 0 ? 'Rice/Noodles' : indexof(datum.meal_text, 'Burger') >= 0 ? 'Burger' : indexof(datum.meal_text, 'Roti') >= 0 || indexof(datum.meal_text, 'Thosai') >= 0 || indexof(datum.meal_text, 'Chapati') >= 0 ? 'Roti/Thosai' : indexof(datum.meal_text, 'Soup') >= 0 ? 'Soup' : indexof(datum.meal_text, 'Snacks') >= 0 || indexof(datum.meal_text, 'Chips') >= 0 || indexof(datum.meal_text, 'Chocolates') >= 0 ? 'Snacks' : indexof(datum.meal_text, 'Beverage') >= 0 ? 'Beverage' : 'Other'
